zh.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: 英國萊希斯特斯爾布頓 奧 馮 希爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bernanke於1280年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾布頓 奧 馮 希爾時，他的父親Hugh Bernanke26歲，母親Maud de Woodthorpe26歲。他於從1304年1月9日到1305年1月8日與Alice Driby在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1339年4月14日在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可海黑瑟特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Bernanke于1280年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾布頓 奧 馮 希爾时，他的父亲Hugh Bernanke26岁，母亲Maud de Woodthorpe26岁。他于从1304年1月9日到1305年1月8日与Alice Driby在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1339年4月14日在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾享年59岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可海黑瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bernanke was born in 1280, in Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, England, his father, Hugh Bernanke, was 26 and his mother, Maud de Woodthorpe, was 26. He married Alice Driby from 9 January 1304 to 8 January 1305, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 14 April 1339, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Hethersett, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bernanke est né en 1280, à Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Bernanke, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maud de Woodthorpe, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alice Driby du 9 janvier 1304 au 8 janvier 1305, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 14 avril 1339, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Hethersett, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Bernanke 1280 in Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Bernanke 26 und seine Mutter Maud de Woodthorpe 26. Er hat von 9. Januar 1304 bis 8. Januar 1305 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England Alice Driby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 14. April 1339 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Hethersett, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Alice Driby da 9 gennaio 1304 a 8 gennaio 1305, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 14 aprile 1339, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Hethersett, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Bernankeが1280年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブレエドン オン ス ヒルで生まれた時，父Hugh Bernankeは26歳，母Maud de Woodthorpeは26歳であった。から1304年1月9日まで1305年1月8日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでAlice Dribyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1339年4月14日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクヘスエルセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bernanke(이)가 1280년 영국 레이스스터실르 브리던  테 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Bernanke(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Woodthorpe(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1304년 1월 9일부터 1305년 1월 8일까지 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 Alice Driby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1339년 4월 14일 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 헤더세트에 묻혔다.

pt.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bernanke nasceu em 1280, em Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Bernanke, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Woodthorpe, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Driby de 9 de janeiro de 1304 a 8 de janeiro de 1305, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de abril de 1339, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Breedon on the Hill, Leicestershire, Eng: бридон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bernanke родился в 1280 г. в местности бридон он т хилл, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Bernanke было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Woodthorpe, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Driby с 9 января 1304 по 8 января 1305 в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 14 апреля 1339 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности хетирсетт, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alice Driby desde 9 de enero de 1304 hasta 8 de enero de 1305, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas.
